items.title: Walcott: Arteta is going to continue to dominate
items.summary: “I think he is just going to continue to dominate. I do,” says Theo Walcott. He is talking about Mikel Arteta and his Arsenal team. It is just days since the Gunners ended their wait for a trophy. Now, there is a sense that they are on the cusp of something greater.
